extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai soloed from early break on Col de Marie Blanc to take stage and yellow, VINGEGAARD dropped POGAČAR by 1:04 when attacking on same climb
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma attacked Marie Blanc when yellow jersey dropped, not waiting for Pogačar cooperation, maximizing gap tactically
HINDLEY exploited early break with 22-second GC deficit to leapfrog into yellow, not just stage hunting
UAE Emirates cracked defending yellow on first HC climb at stage 5, exposing depth issues earlier than expected
POGAČAR found willing domestique in YATES during chase, suggesting cross-team alliances forming against Vingegaard's dominance

rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: Tour debut GC threat at 22s proved legitimate, attacked from break on Marie Blanc to take stage and yellow by 47s
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Attacked and dropped Pogačar by 1:04 on Marie Blanc, gaining time while rival defended yellow jersey duties
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: Dropped when Vingegaard attacked Marie Blanc, required Yates assistance in chase, lost yellow and 1:04 to rival
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Lost yellow jersey on first HC climb, dropped to fifth at 1:40, UAE depth concerns confirmed
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: negative: Last of elite group dropped on Marie Blanc, suggests unable to follow when racing intensifies
rider_signals.GAL Felix: positive: Took KOM jersey by attacking for points on Sourde and Marie Blanc from break
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Lost significant time on Marie Blanc, indicating continued struggles post-injury
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Dropped badly on Marie Blanc, raising questions about GC viability
